rss.snippet: The UK's competition watchdog says it is looking at five firms in its investigation into misleading online reviews.

rss.title: Judge rejects Pentagon's attempt to 'cripple' Anthropic
rss.snippet: A federal judge told the government it could not immediately enforce a ban on Anthropic’s tools.

rss.title: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
rss.snippet: US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.

arxiv_papers.title: Decidable By Construction: Design-Time Verification for Trustworthy AI
arxiv_papers.snippet: A prevailing assumption in machine learning is that model correctness must be enforced after the fact.
